steps.t: Handelen is at Thangúlhad in Gathbúrz. You should bring the engraved dagger you found to Handelen.
Agorin is at Ost Galadh in Emyn Lûm, west of Thangúlhad. Handelen instructed you to bring the engraved dagger you found to Agorin, the Malledhrim Lore…
Handelen is at Thangúlhad in Gathbúrz. You should return to Handelen and tell him what you have learned from Agorin about the Watchers of Dol Guldur.
